title:
AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SOUTH LAMINUSA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE
MUNICIPALITY OF SIASI, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO PANGLIMA SAIPUDIN ELEMENTARY
SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1362 / 67 OG No. 37, 7238 (September 13, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6209, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SOUTH LAMINUSA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE

MUNICIPALITY OF SIASI, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO PANGLIMA SAIPUDIN ELEMENTARY

SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of South Laminusa Elementary School in the Municipality of Siasi, Province of Sulu, is changed to Panglima Saipudin Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
